properties.sfomuseum:description: Wall calendar issued by Pan American World Airways for 1992; drawings by artist Robert Taylor  for Pan Am Clipper Cargo; white cover with black and white image of Boeing 377 Stratocruiser in flight; images of various aircraft for each month.
